focus: Docs, topology, unsafe URL use, voice-evidence overclaiming, and manifest-schema fixture coverage.

findings.summary: The SERVES rerun example included the bakeoff voice suite without voice latency inputs, which would mark the voice subsection skipped.
findings.resolution: Added --voice-latency-ms, --stt-latency-ms, and --tts-latency-ms to the documented bakeoff command.

findings.summary: The approximate decode-rate formula omitted the milliseconds-to-seconds conversion.
findings.resolution: Changed the formula to output_tokens * 1000 / (e2e_ms - ttft_ms).

checks.name: unsafe loopback-alias scan
checks.notes: Only intentional negative tests mention the forbidden loopback alias.

checks.name: mini model-free topology
checks.notes: Docs preserve Mini as gateway/proxy host only and Dark as model/audio host.

checks.name: manifest schema fixture coverage
checks.notes: Manifest schema coverage for required engine and model/served_name remains in tests/test_serves.py.

verification.command: python -m pytest tests/test_mcp.py tests/voice/test_stt_serve.py tests/voice/test_tts_serve.py tests/test_serves.py -q
